text:
Family Matters (ジン=フリークス, Jin Furīkusu—lit. "Ging Freecss") is the 5 th volume of the Hunter × Hunter manga series. It was released by Shueisha on April 30 th , 1999 in Japan and by Viz Media on November 8 th , 2005 in English.

Chapters

36. Light and Darkness: Part 2 (と②, Hikari to Yami (Ni))
37. Light and Darkness: Part 3 (と③, Hikari to Yami (San))
38. Ging Freecss (ジン=フリークス, Jin Furīkusu)
39. Intruder (, Shin'nyūsha)
40. The Zoldycks: Part 1 (ゾルディック①, Zorudikku Ke (Ichi))
41. The Zoldycks: Part 2 (ゾルディック②, Zorudikku Ke (Ni))
42. The Zoldycks: Part 3 (ゾルディック③, Zorudikku Ke (San))
43. The Zoldycks: Part 4 (ゾルディック④, Zorudikku Ke (Yon))
44. The Heavens Arena (, Tenkū Tōgijō)

Summary

One day has passed since Gon was knocked out by Hanzo. He is now officially a Hunter. Shockingly, the sole examinee that did not pass the exam was Killua. When Killua's match against Gittarackur occurred, the latter suddenly revealed himself to be none other than Killua's older brother, Illumi—there to obtain a Hunter License for himself while simultaneously ensuring that Killua did not obtain a license or the freedoms that came with one. Using his knowledge of Killua's thought process and his threats of violence against Gon, Illumi forces Killua to withdraw from their match, after which the latter kills another examinee and fails the exam. Killua then returns to the home he had run away from.

Gon, Kurapika, and Leorio all have the same reaction to these events: they must go to Killua's home and find him. Even so, visiting the home of a famous assassin family is easier said than done. Although the location is publicly known, the three must undergo a radical strength training regimen for nearly a month simply to open the gigantic doors to the Zoldyck estate. Once inside, they contend with bodyguards and servants who are as skilled as a licensed Hunter. In the end, they are still not able to enter the main Zoldyck home. Instead, it is Killua who comes out to them, after reaching an understanding with his father and obtaining permission to leave, have friends, and grow on his own.

After a joyous reunion, it is already time for them to part ways. Leorio must depart to study for entrance exams to a medical university, Kurapika will look for jobs as a Hunter to find information about the Phantom Troupe and the Scarlet Eyes of his people. The four make a pact: they will meet again in six months on September 1 st for the largest auction in the world, in Yorknew City. Gon and Killua then head to a battle tower called Heavens Arena where they plan to train and make money. After arriving, the two easily defeat their first opponents to advance to the 50 th floor.
